effects.name: TOBA
effects.effect: Cannot be Charged. Super Evolves from Toba. Your Opponent gets KO 2 Points if defeated. You can only play 1 Super Evolve Vivosaur card in your Deck.

effects.name: Chilling Waves
effects.effect: Once per turn: you can swap your Opponent's Vivosaur Zones, then all of your Vivosaurs heal 50 LP.

effects.name: Equinas X
effects.effect: Target 2 of your Opponent's Vivosaurs; deal 120 Damage to both Vivosaurs.

effects.name: Equinas Punish
effects.effect: If your Opponent has more cards in their FP Zone than you: Charge WATER Vivosaurs from your discard pile until you have the same number of cards as your Opponent.
